history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right. Moving forward would step into lava at (1,2), so I must turn. The safest path to the goal at (3,3) is to go down first. Turning right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing down. The cell directly ahead is floor. I will move forward to get closer to the goal at (3,3).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,1) facing down. Moving forward would get me to (3,1), but then I cannot go right because (3,2) is lava. Instead, I should go right from here via (2,2) and (2,3) to reach the goal safely. I will turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,1) facing right. The cell ahead, (2,2), is floor (not lava as I initially thought). I can move forward to reach it. Then I will continue right to (2,3), then turn right and move down to the goal at (3,3).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,2) facing right. The cell ahead (2,3) is empty. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at (3,3). From there, I can turn right and move down to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,3) facing right, and the cell ahead is a wall. The goal is at (3,3) directly below me. I need to turn to face down, so I will turn clockwise (right).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,3) facing down, and the cell directly below me is the goal. I will move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
